title: schefflera heptaphylla
intro: Schefflera heptaphylla, also known as the umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain saponins and flavonoids that have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schefflera heptaphylla include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Schefflera heptaphylla can be made by infusing the roots in hot water to create a tea or by using the roots as a tincture.
